name: 🎈Clown Husbandry?!?!🎈
description:
꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰Clownbr has inspired me greatly꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱

Ok, I've been getting really into the world of Clown Husbandry lately and wondering whether or not I should start a series on it. I think I probably will.
I've been inspired by some of the lore on Tumblr, as well as making up my own lore. So, if you use one of my Clown Husbandry bots and see that a certain breed has a different name or different traits than what is stated on Tumblr, then that is my own rendition of the lore. I've seen that on Tumblr, there is no solid guideline to the lore itself, and that everyone pretty much just goes crazy with it and has fun!!!


꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰꒰Honk Honk Honk Honk꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱꒱

Dividers by dollywons on Tumblr!!!
